g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the backbone feature vector contain?')
sendPrompt('Why does fc1 use no bias in the ProjectionHead?')
sendPrompt('Why is batch normalisation used between the two linear layers?')
sendPrompt('What does the ReLU activation do here?')
sendPrompt('Why is dropout set to 0.4 in the ProjectionHead?')
sendPrompt('Why does fc2 use bias=True while fc1 uses bias=False?')
sendPrompt('Why is L2 normalisation the final step in the ProjectionHead?')
sendPrompt('How is the predicted embedding compared to Word2Vec targets?')
